creator: info@system-integrated.de
text:
The upgrade of Â“vim-lite-7.3.669Â” to Â“vim-lite-7.3.669_2Â” failed as a result of conflicts with Â“libsysinfo-0.0.2Â”. Both packages will install files to the same place.

Â“libsysinfo-0.0.2Â” cannot be deleted because itÂ’s needed by Â“rsyslog-6.6.0Â”.

The so the case is, if Â“rsyslog-6.6.0Â” and Â“vim-lite-7.3.669Â” installed on the same machine via ports, upgrades to Â“vim-liteÂ” cannot be compiled.

Â“ports/UPDATINGÂ” includes none hint.

How-To-Repeat: To reproduce the bug, install Â“rsyslog-6.6.0Â” via ports first. Then try to install vim-lite via ports.
